**Default value**: `{'high_backlog_watermark': 100000, 'low_backlog_watermark': 100000, 'min_disk_space': 0, 'rules': [{'exclude_categories': [], 'max_level': 'maximum', 'min_level': 'info', 'writers': ['Stderr']}], 'writers': {'Stderr': {'common_fields': {}, 'enable_host_field': false, 'enable_native_tags': false, 'enable_source_location': false, 'enable_system_fields': true, 'format': 'plain_text', 'type': 'stderr', 'yson_format': 'text'}}}`
Logging settings. ||

**Default value**: `{}`

**Default value**: `{}`

|| `cluster_url` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Required parameter**
Name of the cluster where the pipeline is located. ||
|| `proxy_role` | **Type**: `std::optional<std::string>`
**Required parameter**
The [proxy role](../../user-guide/proxy/about#rpc_proxy) to use for performing operations on the pipeline. ||
|| `path` | **Type**: `TString`
**Required parameter**
Path to the pipeline on {{product-name}}. ||
|| `spec` | **Type**: `NYT::TIntrusivePtr<`[NYT::NFlow::TPipelineSpec](./all_yson_structs#NYT_NFlow_TPipelineSpec)`>`
**Required parameter**
Static spec with which to start the pipeline. ||
|| `dynamic_spec` | **Type**: `NYT::TIntrusivePtr<`[NYT::NFlow::TDynamicPipelineSpec](./all_yson_structs#NYT_NFlow_TDynamicPipelineSpec)`>`
**Default value**: `{}`
Dynamic spec with which to start the pipeline. ||
|| `abort_on_unrecognized_options` | **Type**: `bool`
**Default value**: `false`
 ||
|| `abort_on_specs_parseability_error` | **Type**: `bool`
**Default value**: `false`
 ||
|| `vanilla` | **Type**: `NYT::TIntrusivePtr<`[NYT::NFlow::TVanillaConfig](./all_yson_structs#NYT_NFlow_TVanillaConfig)`>`
If set and `enable=%true`, the runner starts a vanilla operation on {{product-name}} and runs the federation inside it, instead of starting the controller/workers locally. ||
|| `set_flow_core_target` | **Type**: `bool`
**Default value**: `true`
 ||
